overall.description: Gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt of Rivia walking through the Mediterranean-inspired city of Beauclair in Toussaint. The character emerges from a dark stone archway into sunlit cobblestone streets, walks along a flower-covered pergola overlooking a lake with a snow-capped mountain in the background, and descends stairs to a waterfront promenade.

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a dark stone archway tunnel with low lighting. As the character emerges around the 2-second mark, the scene transitions to a sunlit cobblestone street lined with historic stone buildings. The camera follows the character walking forward through the narrow passage.

agents.ego_description: walking along the upper terrace with stone balustrade, admiring the mountain views

pedestrian in orange dress walking along terrace

blue lake visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The character emerges onto a wide, sunlit terrace with panoramic views of a snow-capped mountain and distant lake. The cobblestone path continues along ornate stone railings, passing other pedestrians. Historic buildings with red tile roofs line the left side while the open vista expands to the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: flower-covered pergola walkway overlooking the lake

events.description: walking under wooden pergola covered in blooming red roses

agents.ego_description: walking under the flower-covered pergola, passing NPCs enjoying the view

woman in red dress walking ahead under the pergola

entered.detail: wooden beam structure covered in red climbing roses
dense red roses climbing the pergola columns
calm blue lake water visible through the pergola
castle or large building across the lake

segments.scene_description: The character enters a beautiful wooden pergola covered in dense red roses that creates a dappled light effect. The walkway follows the lake edge, offering views of the water and a distant castle across the shore. Other pedestrians and a guard are visible enjoying the scenic terrace.

scene_state.functional_zone: stone staircase descending to waterfront promenade

events.description: beginning descent down stone stairs toward the water
reaching the bottom of stairs and entering waterfront promenade

agents.ego_description: descending the stone stairs alongside the water, then walking along the lower waterfront path

notable_agents.action: woman in medieval dress walking along the waterfront

entered.detail: worn stone stairs descending alongside the building
yellow stone building with red roof adjacent to the water
rocky shoreline along the calm water

segments.scene_description: The character exits the pergola and begins descending a stone staircase alongside the waterfront building. Reaching the bottom, the scene opens to a lower waterfront promenade with the lake now visible on the left. The path continues along the water's edge past colorful buildings and other pedestrians.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a dim, enclosed passage into a sprawling, sun-drenched Mediterranean cityscape. It begins within a dark stone archway, moving forward as the low lighting gives way to a bright cobblestone street lined with historic buildings. As the character emerges from the narrow passage, the scene expands onto a wide terrace with red-tiled roofs and a panoramic vista of a distant lake and snow-capped mountains. The camera then glides through a wooden pergola draped in dense red roses, creating a dappled light effect before turning toward a stone staircase. Finally, the view descends to a lower waterfront promenade, where the path opens up alongside colorful buildings and the shimmering edge of the lake.
